metadata.summary: 6 mandatory MCPs, fallback resilience, tool addition process

definition.core_right: Citizens possess right to use MCP tools

powers.integration: Research via IAS /research, propose additions (≥95% consensus), configure mcp_servers.json, define patterns, audit effectiveness (progress.json)
powers.protected: Parliament cannot remove core 6 MCPs (amendment required), Ministers cannot block 0-99% ops, Chief Justice HALTs for missing trails, IAS maintains health/availability

mcp_integration: PRE: Read schemas, get patterns from memory.json, @mcp:context7 docs, @mcp:fetch benchmarks → activeContext
EXEC: @mcp:sequential-thinking plan (≥3), calculate metrics, implement, @mcp:git stage
POST: Validate, timestamp, store in memory.json → +10 RL progress.json
MISSING: HALT, -15 RL, log mistakes.json, require remediation
tool_addition: 1. IAS: @mcp:context7 docs, @mcp:fetch benchmarks, @mcp:sequential-thinking risk, calculate impact → systemPatterns.json
2. Parliament: Propose scratchpad.json, Opposition challenges mistakes.json, debate @mcp:sequential-thinking, calculate consensus
3. IF ≥95%: Update mcp_servers.json, @mcp:git commit, store memory.json, +20 RL
4. Monitor: activeContext usage, progress success rates, mistakes patterns, systemPatterns best practices
implementation.coordination_learning: Analyze history in memory.json, calculate effectiveness → identify sequences. Store systemPatterns.json {pattern_name, tools[], success_rate, rl_reward}. Reuse: Retrieve → apply → +20 RL → adapt

violations.remediation: 20 operations full MCP trails, 100% compliance, IAS audit, demonstrate learning (memory.json), Chief Justice approval
